question:
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Six persons - P, Q, R, S, T, and U are sitting on a
triangular table such that all of them are facing
towards the center, but not necessarily in the
same order. Three persons are sitting on the
corners while three persons are sitting in the
middle of the sides of the table. Q sits third to
the right of R. Only one person sits between Q
and T, who is immediate left of R. As many
persons sit between S and T is the same as
between Q and S, who is an immediate
neighbour of R. P sits second to the left of U. P
does not sit on the corner of the table.
 
Which of the following statement(s) is/are true
with respect to the final arrangement?

neighbour of R. P sits second to the left of U.
P does not sit on the corner of the table. From

Hence, No one sits between U and Q is true.

question:

and answer the questions accordingly.

around a triangular-shaped table. Two people sit
in the middle of each of the three sides. All are

information is not necessarily in the same order.
N sits fourth to the right of Q. P sits fourth to the
left of R. There are three people sitting between
P and M. There are two people sitting between M
and O.
How many people sit between N and Q ?
